audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds via Rust's type system enforcement. Return type CellsAndKzgProofs is defined as ([Cell; CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB], [KzgProof; CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB]) with fixed-size arrays at compile time. The compiler statically guarantees exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cells and proofs per blob; deviation is impossible without compilation failure.
